recent.title: PHP's Journey: From Simple Scripts to Modern Powerhouse
recent.excerpt: Let's explore how PHP evolved from a personal project to power 77% of the web. We'll look at the key changes that transformed PHP into the robust language it is today.

recent.title: Getting Started with PHP: Your First Script
recent.excerpt: Ready to write your first PHP script? Let's build on what we learned about PHP's evolution and dive into the practical basics - from setting up a simple script to understanding how variables work.
